case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. DANIEL ALEJANDRO MEJIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MEJIA, DANIEL ALEJANDRO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
